\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4836 introduces Cymatic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$H_cymatic = _ (r, t) _acoustic[, k, t] \\, d^3r _n=1^153,600 _n (b_n^ + b_n) a_n^ a_n$$
